title: Senior Doctor - Becton Dickinson India Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Becton Dickinson India Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India Global Group in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India Global Group:
Becton Dickinson India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India Global Group!
